description: Medical OCR correction dictionary for Arabic handwriting — comprehensive orthopedic & general medical terminology

posterior elements of spine, long bones
metaphysis of distal femur, proximal tibia

Bone and joint infections, anaerobic infections

lab_values.name: Hemoglobin
lab_values.clinical_note: Low in chronic disease, blood loss

lab_values.clinical_note: Acute phase reactant, rises in infection

lab_values.name: Alkaline Phosphatase
lab_values.clinical_note: Elevated in bone disease, fracture healing, Paget

lab_values.name: Phosphate
lab_values.clinical_note: Elevated in renal failure, tumor lysis

regex_corrections.description: Fix garbled Osteoblastoma with OCR artifacts
Fix heavily garbled Solitary Bone Cyst (5olifaty bones kysfe)
Fix garbled Transverse Fracture with OCR artifacts

arabic_ocr_error_patterns.note: Middle letter of root confused in Arabic OCR
Multiple Unicode representations of taa marbuta
Hamza on alif confused with bare alif
Hamza on waw confused with waw
Hamza on yaa confused with yaa
Lam-alif ligature broken into separate characters
Connecting letter forms in medial/final position
Arabic letters with similar baseline shapes confused
Common OCR error separating waw and raa
Common OCR error separating yaa and meem
Common OCR error separating daal and raa
Common OCR error separating noon and qaf

types.description: Clean wound <1cm, minimal soft tissue damage
types.ar: نوع أول: جرح نظيف أقل من 1 سم
نوع ثاني: جرح أكبر من 1 سم، تلف متوسط
نوع ثالث أ: تغطية نسيجية كافية

types.description: Extensive soft tissue loss, periosteal stripping
types.ar: نوع ثالث ب: فقد نسيجي واسع
نوع ثالث ج: إصابة وعائية تحتاج إصلاح

signs_and_symptoms.description: Tapping over nerve reproduces tingling — nerve compression
Wrist flexion reproduces symptoms — carpal tunnel
Inability to lower arm slowly — rotator cuff tear
De Quervain tenosynovitis — thumb in fist, ulnar deviation
Lasègue sign — sciatic nerve tension / disc herniation
Knee flexion in prone — femoral nerve / L3-L4

imaging_modalities.use: Complex fractures, surgical planning, bone detail
Soft tissue, ligaments, cartilage, marrow edema, tumors
Metastases, stress fractures, infection (sensitive, not specific)
Soft tissue, joint effusion, vascular, DVT screening
Tumor staging, metastases, infection vs tumor
Bone stress lesions, spinal fusion assessment

compartment_anatomy.description: Compartments of upper and lower extremity (relevant to compartment syndrome)

compartments.ar: العضد: أمامي (ذات الرأسين), خلفي (العضلة ثلاثية الرؤوس)
اليد: ثمّني, أخمصي, بين العظمي (ظهري + راحي), مقربة

compartments: Deep posterior (FHL, FDL, tibialis posterior, TP)
compartments.ar: الساق: أمامي, وحشي (الشظوية), خلفي سطحي (الربلة), خلفي عميق
